seo.title: Work with me — Blue Studio
seo.description: Quiet marketing for the patient, and the patiently impatient. Brand voice, content strategy, campaign copy by Nina Pfeiffer.

hero.heading: Quiet marketing for the patient,
hero.sub: I write brand voice, content strategy, and campaign copy for small businesses that want to sound like themselves again. No "engagement-bait." No twelve posts a week. Just one true thing, well said, on a useful cadence.

items.title: Brand voice & messaging
items.body: The way the brand sounds in writing — guidelines, tone, vocabulary, what it doesn't say. Includes a voice doc you'll actually use.

items.title: Content strategy
items.body: What to post, on what cadence, and (just as important) what to stop doing. Editorial calendars built around your real capacity.

items.title: Campaign concepts & copy
items.body: Launches, seasonal pushes, the occasional manifesto. From idea to written assets, ready to ship.

items.title: Slow retainers
items.body: One good thing per week. Could be a post, an email, a campaign brief — whatever the brand actually needs that week.

yesItems: You think your brand sounds like everyone else's and it bothers you.
You'd rather post less and mean it more.
You want a writer in the room, not a "content creator."
Your audience doesn't show up for trends. Yours.
noItems: You need 30 pieces of content this month, no preference on which.
You want someone to manage your DMs.
The brief is "make us sound like <competitor>."

contact.heading: Tell me about your brand.
contact.sub: A few sentences is plenty. I'll write back within a week.
contact.messagePlaceholder: What does the brand do? What feels off about how it currently sounds? What would 'better' look like to you?
